sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_lists (id INTEGER, list_data LIST<INTEGER>);
UPDATE test_lists SET list_data = array_cat(list_data, [6, 7]) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, array_cat(list_data, [8, 9]) AS concatenated_list FROM test_lists;
SELECT id, list_cat(list_data, [10]) AS extended_list FROM test_lists WHERE id = 2;
